name: apple-dev
description: Apple platform development tools and knowledge for iOS, Swift, SwiftUI, and App Store Connect. Covers Swift 6, SwiftUI, design, accessibility, concurrency, Apple review auditing, CI build checks, and ASC API automation.

tools.name: pattern-check
tools.description: Run Apple patterns validation (Swift 6, SwiftUI, SwiftData, entitlements, safety checks) via grep/shell audit.

path.description: Project path to check (default: current directory)

tools.name: api-lookup
tools.description: Look up iOS 26 API signatures and anti-hallucination reference.

query.description: API name, framework, or keyword to look up
